checks.name: public root UI with query parameters
checks.evidence: Second pass root URL with q=boundary layer transition returned HTML containing the search interface, Indexed Data panel, and query text.

checks.name: public metadata alias
checks.evidence: /api/datasets/cranfield returned 1,400 documents, 1,837 relevance judgments, and topic hint 'airfoils'.

checks.name: public canonical Cranfield search
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/search returned live cranfield-v0 results for 'boundary layer transition'; top result id 337; total hits 533; API latency 306 ms; OpenSearch took 6 ms.

checks.name: public canonical Cranfield explain
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/explain returned the generated OpenSearch query and top result id 337 for 'boundary layer transition'; API latency 259 ms; OpenSearch took 7 ms.

blocked_or_skipped.name: browser visual screenshot
blocked_or_skipped.reason: The browser plugin reported no available browser instances.

evidence_quality: Second pass confirmed public UI, metadata, search, and explain behavior with a different query and canonical endpoints.
